'''âw-p-l''' ('''wapala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naturalize|naturalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naturalize|naturalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| wapala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wapalithi|wapalithi]] || [[word:wapaliji|wapaliji]] || [[word:wapalishi|wapalishi]] || [[word:wapali|wapali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapaluthuth|wapaluthuth]] || [[word:wapalujuj|wapalujuj]] || [[word:wapalushush|wapalushush]] || [[word:wapal|wapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapaluthu|wapaluthu]] || [[word:wapaluju|wapaluju]] || [[word:wapalushu|wapalushu]] || [[word:wapalu|wapalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapalufuth|wapalufuth]] || [[word:wapalufuj|wapalufuj]] || [[word:wapalufush|wapalufush]] || [[word:wapaluf|wapaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wapalethe|wapalethe]] || [[word:wapaleje|wapaleje]] || [[word:wapaleshe|wapaleshe]] || [[word:wapale|wapale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapalothoth|wapalothoth]] || [[word:wapalojoj|wapalojoj]] || [[word:wapaloshosh|wapaloshosh]] || [[word:wapal|wapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapalotho|wapalotho]] || [[word:wapalojo|wapalojo]] || [[word:wapalosho|wapalosho]] || [[word:wapalo|wapalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapalofoth|wapalofoth]] || [[word:wapalofoj|wapalofoj]] || [[word:wapalofosh|wapalofosh]] || [[word:wapalof|wapalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wapalĂŠthĂŠ|wapalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wapalĂŠjĂŠ|wapalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wapalĂŠshĂŠ|wapalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wapalĂŠ|wapalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wapalathath|wapalathath]] || [[word:wapalajaj|wapalajaj]] || [[word:wapalashash|wapalashash]] || [[word:wapal|wapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wapalatha|wapalatha]] || [[word:wapalaja|wapalaja]] || [[word:wapalasha|wapalasha]] || [[word:wapala|wapala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wapalafath|wapalafath]] || [[word:wapalafaj|wapalafaj]] || [[word:wapalafash|wapalafash]] || [[word:wapalaf|wapalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wapalasha|wapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowapalasha|gowapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwapalasha|gokiwapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wapalnĂŒsha|wapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowapalnknĂŒsha|gowapalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwapalnĂŒsha|gokiwapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wapalshĂ«sha|wapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowapalnkshĂ«sha|gowapalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwapalshĂ«sha|gokiwapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wapalrosha|wapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowapalnkrosha|gowapalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwapalrosha|gokiwapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wapalmusha|wapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapalnkmusha|gowapalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapalmusha|gokiwapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wapalsherasha|wapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowapalnksherasha|gowapalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwapalsherasha|gokiwapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wapalngasha|wapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowapalnkngasha|gowapalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwapalngasha|gokiwapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wapalyasha|wapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowapalnkyasha|gowapalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwapalyasha|gokiwapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wapalyamasha|wapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowapalnkyamasha|gowapalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwapalyamasha|gokiwapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|wapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wapalnĂŒrosha|wapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowapalnknĂŒrosha|gowapalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwapalnĂŒrosha|gokiwapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapalnĂŒmusha|wapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapalnknĂŒmusha|gowapalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapalnĂŒmusha|gokiwapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|wapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wapalshĂ«rosha|wapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowapalnkshĂ«rosha|gowapalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwapalshĂ«rosha|gokiwapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapalshĂ«musha|wapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapalnkshĂ«musha|gowapalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapalshĂ«musha|gokiwapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wapalronĂŒsha|wapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowapalnkronĂŒsha|gowapalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwapalronĂŒsha|gokiwapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wapalroshĂ«sha|wapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowapalnkroshĂ«sha|gowapalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwapalroshĂ«sha|gokiwapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wapalromusha|wapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowapalnkromusha|gowapalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwapalromusha|gokiwapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wapalmunĂŒsha|wapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowapalnkmunĂŒsha|gowapalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwapalmunĂŒsha|gokiwapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wapalmushĂ«sha|wapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowapalnkmushĂ«sha|gowapalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwapalmushĂ«sha|gokiwapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wapalmurosha|wapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowapalnkmurosha|gowapalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwapalmurosha|gokiwapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wapal|wapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠpĂŠl|wĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howapal|howapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠpĂŠl|howĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowapal|hohowapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠpĂŠl|hohowĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwapal|nĂŒwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwapal|nĂŒnĂŒwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwapal|nĂŻwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwapal|nĂŻnĂŻwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwapal|luwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠpĂŠl|luwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwapal|luluwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠpĂŠl|luluwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwapal|liwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠpĂŠl|liwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwapal|liliwapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠpĂŠl|liliwĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowapal|kowapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠpĂŠl|kowĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowapal|kokowapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠpĂŠl|kokowĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewapal|kewapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠpĂŠl|kewĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewapal|kekewapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠpĂŠl|kekewĂŠpĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
